title: Using RNA GC Content to Predict Optimal Growth Temperatures for Pathogenic Bacteria

steps.instruction: SL30062 Final Year Project A (BB30042) Code/Input File Repository for Final Year Project A (Student ID: 209045464) Using the residuals of structural RNA GC content to predict optimal growth temperatures as a marker for pathogenic bacteria.
